home-page-container.title: Nkyer…õkyer…õ K…õse
home-page-container.subtitle: B…î mm…îden na hu ns…õm a …õy…õ den fa …îman no ho. Download anaa fa nk…î fie na k…îfa nwoma a …õda …îk…õse ne b…îne ntam a …õda ho adi, na s…õnea wubetumi ay…õ no y…õ.

quote-container.quote: Awurade kyer…õ…õ me s…õ menkyer…õw nwoma yi de s…õ *nt…õm* na …õb…õy…õ a …õb…õda *nky…õn* abato…î mu, efis…õ ns…õm a …õw…î mu no y…õ nokware a …õho hia ma nkur…îfo a w…îp…õ s…õ w…îda Awurade da no mu.
quote-container.author: Ellen G. White

step-one.explanation: Da Adwuma no kyer…õ Local Church Board

summary-container.paragraph-1: 'Wop…õ anaa wop…õ s…õ woka s…õ wiase no rey…õ yiye anaa …õny…õ yiye? ∆êy…õ nokware s…õ, mp…õn pii nnipa nnansa yi gye di s…õ wiase no rey…õ b…îne. Ebia saa ns…õm b…îne yi fi …îman a …õda ns…õm b…îne ho adanse anaa ebia y…õn ho nimdefo y…õ nokware a …õda ns…õm a …õy…õ den a edidi so yi: Biribi y…õ b…îne w…î y…õn asase so, na y…õn ho nyansa nni h…î s…õ y…õb…õsesa no.
summary-container.paragraph-2: 'Nkyer…õkyer…õ K…õse' no mfa ns…õm a …õda …îman no ho nyansa nni ho, na …õda ns…õm k…õse a …õda so w…î …îman no mu. Wobehui s…õ b…îne w…î ne nan mu, papa biara w…î ne Kanyan, na sin biara w…î ne awiei. S…õ wop…õ s…õ woyere wo ho ma wiase yi awiei ne …îman pa a …õb…õn so no, wop…õ s…õ wokenkan nwoma yi.

distribution-package-container.paragraph-1: Wop…õ s…õ woboaboa ma ns…õm a …õy…õ anidaso no? W…î abato…î k…õse yi a …õy…õ …îman no ho, y…õde abato…î k…õse a …õy…õ …îf…õ ne ns…õm a …õy…õ mmer…õ ne nk…îso…î b…î mu a y…õda ho adi s…õnea …õb…õboa ma ns…õm a …õy…õ den yi atwa mu w…î wo kurom.
distribution-package-container.paragraph-2: Download abato…î k…õse no seesei na y…õka ho b…î mu! Fa w'adwene y…õ adwuma, fa wo kurom nsa ka ho, na boa ma ns…õm a …õy…õ den no atwa mu p…îtee.

book-available-formats-container.no-options: Y…õn nni download options biara mma saa nkyer…õmu yi.

receive-at-home-container.title: Fa nk…î fie
receive-at-home-container.subtitle: Gye di ns…õm a …õy…õ anidaso! Hu nokware a …õb…õsesa nkwa w…î 'Nkyer…õkyer…õ K…õse' mu. B…î mm…îden na bisa wo dea na hu anidaso p…îtee w…î wo nan mu.

form-errors.name: Pleas…õ kyer…õ wo din
form-errors.number: Pleas…õ kyer…õ wo namba ne ns…õm a …õka ho (saa ara)

receive-at-home-container.success-message: 'Order' no reko so! Pleas…õ hwehw…õ wo email box.
receive-at-home-container.error-message: 'Order' no y…õ b…îne. Pleas…õ san mmra bio.
